docs.name: Caustic Light Card
docs.description: A premium card surface with animated pool-like caustic highlights rendered by a lightweight WebGL2 fragment shader. Caustics are masked to the lower region, brightest near the bottom, with hover-driven boosts to intensity and speed. Off-screen cards pause automatically and only four visible cards animate at once.

props.name: causticColor
props.description: Tint for the caustic highlights. Use warm off-whites for natural pool-light refractions.

props.name: intensity
props.description: Base brightness multiplier for caustic glow.

props.name: coverage
props.description: Fraction of card height covered by caustics (0-1). Higher values push shimmer farther upward.

props.name: className
props.description: Classes for the outer card wrapper.

props.name: children
props.description: Foreground content rendered above the caustic overlay.

docs.overview: CausticLightCard renders a compact WebGL2 shader on an absolutely-positioned canvas and blends it over a gradient card base using `mix-blend-mode: screen`. The shader generates layered caustic streaks from animated noise + sine interference, then masks the effect to the lower band of the card so content remains readable. Hover interactions spring both intensity and speed to deliver a premium 'alive' response without abrupt jumps. Reduced-motion users get a frozen curated frame. Performance protections are built in: rendering pauses when the card is off-screen and the global runtime limits active animated instances to four simultaneously.

scenarios.title: Premium feature card surface
scenarios.description: Use as a hero feature tile where the lower half shimmers like reflected water while text stays high-contrast.

scenarios.title: Calm ambient background
scenarios.description: Lower speed and intensity for a subtle ambient glow that supports copy-heavy sections.

scenarios.title: Warm sunset tint
scenarios.description: Change causticColor to align with a brand palette or mood lighting.
